calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Feb-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ed Higginbotham, via ZOOM, specially appearing for Junios Poole, Petitioner.

Mr. Higginbotham is advised that he is being allowed to appear today because he is an attorney, even though he does not formally represent the petitioner. Mr. Higginbotham asks where he can find the Examiner's notes and tentative rulings from previous dates to confirm what items the court requires. Mr. Higginbotham is referred to the court's website to find the information he is looking for.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to Feb-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
